tables.title: Infant CPR at a Glance
rows: At least 1/3 chest depth (~1.5 in / 4 cm)
Heel of one hand (if unable to encircle)
Lower half of sternum, just below nipple line
Tap the sole of the foot

tables.title: 2025 Infant Technique Change
rows: Preferred (including lone rescuer who can encircle)
Alternative when unable to encircle the chest
